questions.question: Describe the process of implementing a double transposition cipher, including the steps involved in key generation, plaintext preparation, and ciphertext extraction. (15 marks)
What are the key characteristics of a double transposition cipher, and how does it differ from a single transposition cipher? (10 marks)

A double transposition cipher involves two transposition matrices. If the first matrix has dimensions 3x5 and the second matrix has dimensions 5x3, find the number of possible orientations for the cipher. (8 marks)
